name: sovereignty-scan-mcp
description: EU AI Act vendor sovereignty scanner. Checks provider HQ country, data residency regions, EU residency option, US CLOUD Act exposure, and GDPR DPA availability across 55 tracked providers.

tools.name: scan_provider
tools.description: Returns the full jurisdictional profile for a single vendor: headquarters country, data residency regions, EU residency option, US CLOUD Act exposure, GDPR DPA availability, and legal framework.

tools.name: scan_stack
tools.description: Aggregate jurisdictional summary for a stack of providers: CLOUD Act exposure count, EU residency coverage, and missing DPAs. Maximum 50 providers per call.

tools.name: list_providers
tools.description: List all tracked providers, with optional category filter.

tools.name: get_us_cloud_act_providers
tools.description: Returns all providers subject to US CLOUD Act compelled disclosure (18 U.S.C. § 2713).

tools.name: suggest_eu_alternatives
tools.description: Returns EU/EEA/UK/CH-based alternatives in the same category as the given provider. Alternatives have eu_residency_option=true and headquarters in an EU member state, EEA country, UK, or Switzerland. Capped at 10.
